'''sakocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:kyodai|kyodai]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kyodai|kyodai]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sakocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sækecheth|sækecheth]] || [[word:sækechej|sækechej]] || [[word:sækechesh|sækechesh]] || [[word:sækeche|sækeche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakokochoth|sakokochoth]] || [[word:sakokochoj|sakokochoj]] || [[word:sakokochosh|sakokochosh]] || [[word:sakokocho|sakokocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakochoth|sakochoth]] || [[word:sakochoj|sakochoj]] || [[word:sakochosh|sakochosh]] || [[word:sakocho|sakocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakofchoth|sakofchoth]] || [[word:sakofchoj|sakofchoj]] || [[word:sakofchosh|sakofchosh]] || [[word:sakofchof|sakofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sakochotho|sakochotho]] || [[word:sakochojo|sakochojo]] || [[word:sakochosho|sakochosho]] || [[word:sakochoko|sakochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sakochoth|sakochoth]] || [[word:sakochoj|sakochoj]] || [[word:sakochosh|sakochosh]] || [[word:sakocho|sakocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sakochothol|sakochothol]] || [[word:sakochojol|sakochojol]] || [[word:sakochoshol|sakochoshol]] || [[word:sakochokol|sakochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sakochothotho|sakochothotho]] || [[word:sakochojojo|sakochojojo]] || [[word:sakochoshosho|sakochoshosho]] || [[word:sakochoko|sakochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sakochothon|sakochothon]] || [[word:sakochojon|sakochojon]] || [[word:sakochoshon|sakochoshon]] || [[word:sakochokon|sakochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sakochothoro|sakochothoro]] || [[word:sakochojoro|sakochojoro]] || [[word:sakochoshoro|sakochoshoro]] || [[word:sakochokoro|sakochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5db7a01}}
